_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: all samples, including the 25 NF1 and 60 SWN-NOS cases, exhibited moderate to high expression of HER1
details: Successfully detected HER1 expression in all 85 NF1/SWN tumor samples with moderate to high expression levels
